zh.lifeSummary: 當Ida de Mortagne於大約1095年出生在比利時海瑙特圖爾奈時，她的父親Everard de Mortagne I Castellan Tournai36歲，母親Hèlvide De Mortain27歲。她於1120年與Seigneur d'Avesnes Wauthier I d'Oisy結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1138年在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德奧易希享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ida de Mortagne于大约1095年出生在比利时海瑙特圖爾奈时，她的父亲Everard de Mortagne I Castellan Tournai36岁，母亲Hèlvide De Mortain27岁。她于1120年与Seigneur d'Avesnes Wauthier I d'Oisy结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1138年在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德奧易希享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mortagne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Francoise, Herve, Marcel, Philippe, Pierre.

French: topographic name for someone who lived on or near a hill, from Old French montaine ‘hill, (small) mountain’; or a habitational name from any of several places called (La) Montagne, named with the same word.

variants.name: Mountain
meanings: English (Yorkshire; of Norman origin): topographic name from Middle English mountaine ‘mountain’ (Old French montagne). See Montagne .
Irish: either of Norman origin, as 1 above, or a variant of   Manton  .

English: variant of Monkton a habitational name from Monkton (Kent, Somerset), Moor Monkton and Nun Monkton (Yorkshire), Bishop Monkton (Yorkshire), or any of numerous other places called Monkton, named with Old English munuc ‘monk’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Lamontagne
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Lucien, Marcel, Emile, Pierre, Aime, Andre, Fernand, Normand, Gaston, Ovide, Achille.
habitational name for someone from any of several places called La Montagne, or a variant of the topographic name Montagne 1, with fused feminine definite article la.

nameMeanings.name: Ida
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Norman name, of Germanic origin, derived from īd ‘work’. This died out during the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, influenced by its use in Tennyson's The Princess ( 1847 ) for the central character, who devotes herself to the cause of women's rights and women's education in a thoroughly Victorian way. The name is also associated with Mount Ida in Crete, which was connected in classical times with the worship of Zeus, king of the gods, who was supposed to have been brought up in a cave on the mountainside. In the 1930s it became famous as the name of the film star Ida Lupino ( 1914–1995 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Ida de Mortagne was born about 1095, in Tournai, Hainaut, Belgium, her father, Everard de Mortagne I Castellan Tournai, was 36 and her mother, Hèlvide De Mortain, was 27. She married Seigneur d'Avesnes Wauthier I d'Oisy in 1120. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1138, in Oisy, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ida de Mortagne est née environ 1095, à Tournai, Hainaut, Belgique, son père, Everard de Mortagne I Castellan Tournai, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Hèlvide De Mortain, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Seigneur d'Avesnes Wauthier I d'Oisy en 1120. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1138, à Oisy, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ida de Mortagne um 1095 in Tournai, Hennegau, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Everard de Mortagne I Castellan Tournai 36 und ihre Mutter Hèlvide De Mortain 27. Sie hat 1120 Seigneur d'Avesnes Wauthier I d'Oisy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1138 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Oisy, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ida de Mortagne è nata il circa 1095 nel Tournai, Hainaut, Belgio, sua padre, Everard de Mortagne I Castellan Tournai, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Hèlvide De Mortain, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Seigneur d'Avesnes Wauthier I d'Oisy nel 1120. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1138, nel Oisy, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ida de Mortagneが約1095年にベルギーヘイナトトウルナイで生まれた時，父Everard de Mortagne I Castellan Tournaiは36歳，母Hèlvide De Mortainは27歳であった。1120年にSeigneur d'Avesnes Wauthier I d'Oisyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1138年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードオイシで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ida de Mortagne(이)가 대략 1095년 벨기에 하인오트 토우른아이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Everard de Mortagne I Castellan Tournai(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hèlvide De Mortain(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1120년 Seigneur d'Avesnes Wauthier I d'Oisy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1138년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 이시에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ida de Mortagne nasceu aproximadamente 1095, em Tournai, Hainaut, Bélgica, seu pai, Everard de Mortagne I Castellan Tournai, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Hèlvide De Mortain, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Seigneur d'Avesnes Wauthier I d'Oisy em 1120. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1138, em Oisy, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ida de Mortagne родилась около 1095 г. в местности тоурнеи, ханаут, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Everard de Mortagne I Castellan Tournai было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Hèlvide De Mortain, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Seigneur d'Avesnes Wauthier I d'Oisy в 1120 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1138 г. в местности оиси, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ida de Mortagne nació aproximadamente 1095, en Tournai, Hainaut, Bélgica, su papá, Everard de Mortagne I Castellan Tournai, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Hèlvide De Mortain, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Seigneur d'Avesnes Wauthier I d'Oisy en 1120. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1138, en Oisy, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 44 años.
